prompt: Create a cute, richly textured anime illustration of Tama, a blue-haired cat-eared girl in a red Japanese-inspired sailor uniform, posing cheerfully in a pastel scrapbook style. She is shown from the chest up, slightly angled to the right, with one hand raised in a salute near her forehead and one eye winking while the other sparkling blue-purple eye looks at the viewer. Give her short wavy deep navy blue hair with glossy highlights, fluffy dark cat ears with white inner fur, soft blush, and a small pink flower sticker/face paint on her cheek. Her outfit is a crimson sailor-style top with white collar, navy embroidery, gold trim, a large shiny yellow bow at the chest, ornate gold floral patterns on the sleeves, a black choker with a small round gold charm, and a dark hexagonal badge with gold filigree. Add a red beret-like hair accessory with gold embroidery and a decorative gold knot ornament, plus dangling red, white, and gold tassels. The background should be a warm pink plaid fabric pattern with lace-like borders and a handmade greeting-card feel. Include exactly 7 prominent decorative flowers around the frame: one large pink flower at lower left, one small pale blue flower near it, one orange flower lower left-center, one blue flower near bottom center, one yellow flower near upper left-center, one large pink flower at right, and one small yellow flower beside it, with green leaves. In the upper left, add a stitched cloud-shaped speech bubble containing a pink heart, a yellow star, and the Japanese text キラ♪. Add a small handwritten artist logo in the lower right reading @uwa days with a paw-print motif. Use a delicate colored-pencil and watercolor texture, soft paper grain, visible sketch lines, pastel pink lighting, intricate embroidery details, and a cozy kawaii idol-card composition. No photorealism, no 3D rendering, no extra characters, no cropped face, no additional text beyond the bubble and signature.
promptEn: Create a cute, richly textured anime illustration of Tama, a blue-haired cat-eared girl in a red Japanese-inspired sailor uniform, posing cheerfully in a pastel scrapbook style. She is shown from the chest up, slightly angled to the right, with one hand raised in a salute near her forehead and one eye winking while the other sparkling blue-purple eye looks at the viewer. Give her short wavy deep navy blue hair with glossy highlights, fluffy dark cat ears with white inner fur, soft blush, and a small pink flower sticker/face paint on her cheek. Her outfit is a crimson sailor-style top with white collar, navy embroidery, gold trim, a large shiny yellow bow at the chest, ornate gold floral patterns on the sleeves, a black choker with a small round gold charm, and a dark hexagonal badge with gold filigree. Add a red beret-like hair accessory with gold embroidery and a decorative gold knot ornament, plus dangling red, white, and gold tassels. Include exactly 7 prominent decorative flowers around the frame: one large pink flower at lower left, one small pale blue flower near it, one orange flower lower left-center, one blue flower near bottom center, one yellow flower near upper left-center, one large pink flower at right, and one small yellow flower beside it, with green leaves. In the upper left, add a stitched cloud-shaped speech bubble containing a pink heart, a yellow star, and the Japanese text キラ♪. Add a small handwritten artist logo in the lower right reading @uwa days with a paw-print motif. No photorealism, no 3D rendering, no extra characters, no cropped face, no additional text beyond the bubble and signature.
promptZh: 创作一张可爱且质感丰富的动漫插画，主角是 Tama，一位拥有蓝色头发的猫耳少女，身着红色的日式水手服，以柔和的剪贴簿风格欢快地摆出姿势。画面呈现胸部以上的特写，身体略微向右倾斜，一只手举起在额头附近敬礼，一只眼睛眨眼，另一只闪烁着蓝紫色光芒的眼睛注视着观众。为她设计短波浪状的 深海军蓝 头发，带有光泽感的高光，蓬松的深色猫耳，内侧为白色绒毛，脸颊上有柔和的腮红，并贴着一个粉色小花贴纸/面部彩绘。她的服装是一件深红色的水手风格上衣，配有白色领子、海军蓝刺绣、金色滚边、胸前有一个巨大的亮黄色蝴蝶结，袖口有华丽的金色花卉图案，颈部佩戴黑色颈圈，上面有一个圆形小金饰，以及一个带有金色花丝的深色六角形徽章。添加一个类似红色贝雷帽的头饰，带有金色刺绣和装饰性的金色结饰，以及垂下的红、白、金三色流苏。背景应为温暖的粉色格子布图案，带有蕾丝般的边框，营造出手工贺卡的感觉。在边框周围精确添加 7 朵醒目的装饰花：左下角一朵大粉花，其附近一朵淡蓝色小花，左下中心一朵橙色花，底部中心附近一朵蓝色花，左上中心附近一朵黄色花，右侧一朵大粉花，以及其旁边一朵黄色小花，并配有绿叶。在左上角，添加一个缝合的云朵状对话气泡，里面包含一个粉色爱心、一颗黄色星星以及日文文本 キラ♪。在右下角添加一个手写的小型艺术家标志，写着 @uwa days 并带有爪印图案。使用细腻的彩色铅笔和水彩质感、柔和的纸张纹理、可见的草图线条、柔和的粉色灯光、复杂的刺绣细节，以及温馨的卡哇伊偶像卡构图。禁止写实风格，禁止 3D 渲染，禁止出现额外角色，禁止裁剪脸部，除气泡和签名外，禁止添加任何额外文本。
